project_identity.name: S.K. Sharma & Co.
project_identity.domain: Labour Law Compliance & Biometric Attendance System

logos.description: S.K. Sharma & Co. sun-mark SK monogram.

images.description: Female factory worker operating machinery. Use for employee profile placeholders or onboarding background.
Professional team collaborating in office. Use for Super Admin or HR dashboard headers.
Close up of biometric fingerprint scanning technology. Use for Smart Punch screen visualization.

elements: Massive brand logo (logo-mark.png) centered.
H1 'S.K. Sharma & Co.' in Deep Navy.
Caption tagline 'Compliance · Payroll · Manpower' in Accent Amber.
Large Google Sign-In Button at the bottom (min 56px height).

onboarding_wizard.layout: Step-by-step wizard with persistent bottom CTA.
elements: Top segmented progress bar (3 steps).
Step 1: 'Enter Company Code' with massive centered text input.
Step 2: 'Personal Details' form (Name, Role).
Step 3: 'Employment Terms' document review.
Bottom sticky Action bar with Primary Amber button.

home_dashboard.layout: Scrollable dashboard with Bento Grid layout.
elements: Header: Greeting with User Name and Company Code badge.
Hero Card: 'Today's Shift' (Navy background, White text). Shows current status (Punched In/Out) and a quick punch CTA.
Grid: 2x2 Bento grid for quick stats (Leaves, Tickets, Attendance %, Alerts).
Recent Notifications list below the grid.
Header: Current Date and Time (Massive typography).
Center: Circular biometric graphic (using biometric_fingerprint image in a masked circle) surrounded by a Geofence radius indicator.
Status Text: 'You are within office premises.'
Footer: Sticky massive Amber 'PUNCH IN' / 'PUNCH OUT' button (minHeight: 64px, pill shape).
Header: 'Client Companies' with a Search Bar.
List Item Card: Company Name (H3), Active Employees (Badge), and a 'Shareable 6-char Code' block highlighted in Amber.
Floating Action Button (FAB) in Navy to 'Add New Company'.

instructions_to_main_agent: TRANSLATE TO REACT NATIVE: Use React Native `StyleSheet.create` for all styling. Do NOT use Tailwind CSS classes.
TEST IDS: Add `testID` prop to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs). Example: `testID='punch-in-button'`.
COLORS: Strictly use the defined colors (Primary Navy: #1B3A6E, Deep Navy: #12294F, Accent Amber: #E39A2A, Cream: #FBFBF9).
LAYOUT: Use `SafeAreaView` heavily for screens. The main background color for screens should be `#FBFBF9`.
TOUCH TARGETS: Ensure all buttons and touchable icons have a minimum height and width of 48px to accommodate blue-collar workers.
ASSETS: Use the exact URL `/app/frontend/assets/images/logo-mark.png` for the logo. Use provided remote image URLs for other visual placeholders.
TAB BAR: Implement a custom bottom tab bar where the 'Punch' tab is visually distinct (e.g., elevated or colored Amber).
